LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN HEIN'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BY NOT ADDRESSING THE BUSINESS TRUST ISSUE. THE COURT GRANTS SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE SEVENTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE FOR PLAINTIFF SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE AND DEFENDANT HAS NOT PRESENTED EVIDENCE GIVING RISE TO A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE REMAINING AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN BY SIMPLY RELYING ON DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Motion For Summary Judgment Filed By Plaintiff California Mortgage And Realty, Inc. Motion Will Be Heard In Dept. 302. Judge Busch Recused Himself From The Case.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Demko of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Marmaro (398.8080) for plaintiff and moving party
Bradley Kaplan of O'Connor and Associates (693.9960) for defendant and responding party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE AND REALTY, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied for failure to shift the burden of producing evidence by not addressing the business trust issue. The Court grants summary adjudication as to the seventh affirmative defense for plaintiff shifted the burden of producing evidence and defendant has not presented evidence giving rise to a triable issue of fact. Summary adjudication as to the remaining affirmative defenses is denied. Plaintiff failed to shift the burden by simply relying on defendant's failure to respond to discovery. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
